items.name_en: (With full packaging)!!️Ophidia Series Small Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
(With full packaging)!!️Ophidia Series Small Shoulder Bag
This Ophidia series shoulder bag is crafted from GG Supreme canvas, injecting new life into a classic design. The bag comes with two removable shoulder straps, one chain and one leather, and is adorned with classic striped webbing elements and double G hardware. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, oatmeal leather trim, gold-tone hardware, red and green striped webbing, beige cotton-linen lining with double G, removable chain shoulder strap (22cm long); removable adjustable leather shoulder strap (length adjustable between 50cm and 57cm) Zipper closure.
Model: 795194
Dimensions: 24✖️12✖️12cm
Color: Blue/pvc

items.name_en: (With full set of packaging)!!️ GG Marmont Zip Wallet, Dear Alessandro Michele, every beloved design is connected to the House's past, and the Creative Director has brought it into the current collection. At the core of this precious collection, the GG Marmont is instantly recognized by its Double G monogram—appearing as matching resin hardware on the top of this wallet. Moiré lining, Double G, interior zip pocket, snap closure.

items.name_en: (With full set of packaging)!!️ Queen Margaret series bags are crafted from GG Supreme canvas, a versatile material that continues to play a key role in honoring the brand's origins. The 1970s vintage bee design, set with glass pearls and colored crystals, forms the lock of this small handbag! It features a suede-like microfiber lining.

items.name_en: (With full set of packaging)!!️ The GG Monogram continues to make a modern statement in the new collection. This full-zip wallet is presented in dark grey, featuring the classic interlocking letter pattern with a light and shadow effect for a 3D look. It is equipped with multiple card slots, a bill compartment, and a zip coin pocket, offering a rich and practical interior design.

items.name_en: (With full set of packaging)!!️ The Ophidia series blends the essence of GG tradition with modern design to present a brilliant new creation. This series incorporates two classic details: woven strips and double-G accessories, reinterpreting creative shapes and sizes in the early autumn collection. This men's small shoulder bag effortlessly embodies the subtle beauty of lines. It features an internal pocket and a detachable shoulder strap, adding extra charm to the design.

Size: 24*15*7cm
Color: Brown PVC。
